channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Photos: 100 years of the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade
item.description: The parade in New York City, presented by department store chain Macy's, was first held in 1924 under the heading "Macy's Christmas Parade" to promote holiday sales and spotlight the newly expanded and, at the time, largest in the world Herald Square store in Manhattan.
item.dc:creator: Nicole Caldwell, Stacker, ABC 4

item.title: Romanian court orders recount of first-round election won by far-right outsider
item.description: BUCHAREST, Romania (AP) — A top Romanian court on Thursday asked the official electoral authority to recount and verify all of the ballots cast in the first round of the presidential election, which was won by a far-right outsider candidate, sending shockwaves through the political establishment.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN McGRATH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade kicks off in steady rain a century after its first trip through NYC
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade kicked off Thursday morning in New York City with a steady rain that added ponchos and umbrellas to the lineup of balloons, floats and star-studded performances.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Former British soldier who broke out of prison is convicted of spying for Iran
item.description: LONDON (AP) — A former British soldier whose audacious escape from a London prison spurred a dayslong search was convicted on Thursday of spying for Iran.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MELLEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Court backs Texas over razor wire installed on US-Mexico border
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — A federal appeals court Wednesday ruled that Border Patrol agents cannot cut razor wire that Texas installed on the U.S.-Mexico border in the town of Eagle Pass, which has become the center of the state's aggressive measures to curb migrant crossings. The decision by the 5th U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Why retailers still see Black Friday as the high point of the holiday shopping season
item.description: After weeks of plugging increasingly inviting discounts, retailers in the United States and several other countries are preparing for prime time.
item.dc:creator: Anne D'Innocenzio, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: From disaster to hope: A Vermont family thankful for community support after flood destroyed home
item.description: PEACHAM, Vt. (AP) — The last thing John and Jenny Mackenzie saw as they fled their Vermont home with their daughters, dog and two guinea pigs last summer was their cars upended and propelled away by rushing flood waters.
item.dc:creator: LISA RATHKE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade in NYC: See the balloons inflate before the big day
item.description: The 98th annual Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade will take over Manhattan Thursday morning, lining the streets with extravagant balloons and fanfare.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, WGN 9

item.title: Residents file lawsuit against Kentucky plant that exploded in neighborhood
item.description: LOUISVILLE, Ky. (AP) — Two neighbors of a Kentucky plant that was the site of a massive explosion are suing the company, saying the blast earlier this month damaged their homes and caused emotional trauma.
item.dc:creator: DYLAN LOVAN and BRUCE SCHREINER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 3 dead after fiery Cybertruck crash in California
item.description: The crash involved a solo Tesla Cybertruck that jumped a curb before striking a tree and retaining wall.
item.dc:creator: Michael Thomas, NewsNation

item.title: A California woman was called into work on her day off. She left a lottery winner
item.description: Nobody likes being called into work on their day off. But for one California woman, a last-minute call-in would ultimately change her life for the better.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KRON4

item.title: Armed felon arrested for threatening to kill Trump attended rally weeks after Butler assassination attempt
item.description: Arizona man Manuel Tamayo-Torres charged with lying on federal firearms background check forms and threatening to kill Donald Trump and his family.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lawmakers call for progress on marijuana law before end of Biden administration
item.description: Progressive lawmakers are calling on President Biden to take additional steps on federal marijuana law before his term comes to an end in January. In a letter sent to Biden and Vice President Harris, Democratic Reps. Barbara Lee (Calif.), Earl Blumenauer (Ore.) and Ilhan Omar (Minn.) and Sens.
item.dc:creator: Cheyanne M. Daniels, NewsNation

item.title: Disney agrees to $43 million settlement in gender pay lawsuit
item.description: The agreement settles allegations initially made in a 2019 lawsuit filed by Disney employee LaRonda Rasmussen, who claimed she was getting paid less than her male counterparts in the same role.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, KRON4

item.title: Zach Bryan pauses concert, calls out fan for throwing object on stage
item.description: A country music star whose 'argumentative' behavior has got him in hot water before, paused a recent concert after a fan appears to have thrown something onto stage.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Langenfeld, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 9 indicted in illegal bar scheme across Northeast Ohio
item.description: Nine people in Northeast Ohio are accused of having connections to a “complex network of illegally operated bars.
item.dc:creator: Emily Smith, NewsNation

item.title: 3 Americans held for years in China have been released, White House says
item.description: Three American citizens imprisoned for years by China have been released and are returning to the United States, the White House said Wednesday, announcing a rare diplomatic agreement with Beijing in the final months of the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Number of Americans filing for jobless benefits falls again
item.description: The number of Americans applying for unemployment benefits fell last week, remaining near seven-month lows.
item.dc:creator: MAE ANDERSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Fired workers blamed for knocking over 120 headstones at Tennessee cemetery
item.description: More than 120 headstones at a Tennessee cemetery were knocked over by freshly fired employees, according to the cemetery's owner.
item.dc:creator: Shay Arthur, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 4 takeaways from Trump's health agency nominations
item.description: Almost all have been highly critical of the agencies they would run if confirmed, and experts say the nominees represent a complete overhaul of the vision and priorities of key agencies for health care and public health.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, Fox 5

item.title: A Catholic family's answer to opposing abortion: adopt, foster and vote
item.description: SUNBURY, Ohio (AP) — For the Young family in rural Sunbury, Ohio, activism begins at home. The conservative Catholic family chooses to live their anti-abortion beliefs through adoption, foster-parenting and raising their children to believe in the sanctity of life.
item.dc:creator: CAROLYN KASTER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade seen as attractive terrorist target: report
item.description: There's no specific threat to the biggest Thanksgiving celebration in the country, but authorities from the NYPD up to the federal government are on alert.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fugitive on FBI's 'Most Wanted Terrorist' list captured after more than 20 years on run
item.description: Daniel Andreas San Diego, a fugitive on the FBI’s “Most Wanted Terrorist” list, was captured in the United Kingdom on Monday after more than 20 years.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WFLA, NBC

item.title: San Francisco watchdog Ricci Wynne arrested, suspected of pimping
item.description: Wynne has legions of social media followers. Over the past three years, videos posted on his social media pages, RawRicci415, garnered hundreds of thousands of views.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, KRON4

item.title: Court rejects request to sideline San Jose State volleyball player on grounds she’s transgender
item.description: A federal appeals court upheld a ruling Tuesday that allows a San Jose State women’s volleyball team member to play in this week’s Mountain West Conference tournament after a legal complaint said she should be ineligible on grounds that she is transgender and thus stronger, posing a safety risk to t
item.dc:creator: AMY BETH HANSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Pursuit suspect, police engage in shootout; multiple people detained
item.description: Authorities were pursuing the driver of a fleeing Maserati near West Adams in Los Angeles Tuesday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, Fox 5

item.title: Tim Walz accepts turkey presentation as he eases back into his duties as Minnesota's governor
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — As feathers flew, Tim Walz accepted the symbolic presentation of a turkey Tuesday as he eases back into his duties as Minnesota's governor following the Harris-Walz ticket's defeat in the presidential election.
item.dc:creator: STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Israel approves proposed ceasefire with Lebanon's Hezbollah
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu on Tuesday recommended his Cabinet approve a United States-brokered ceasefire agreement with Lebanon's Hezbollah, setting the stage for an end to nearly 14 months of fighting linked to the ongoing war in the Gaza Strip.
item.dc:creator: JOSEF FEDERMAN, KAREEM CHEHAYEB and BASSEM MROUE Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: WATCH: Man throws coffee at charging elk in Colorado
item.description: A video has surfaced of a man throwing what appears to be coffee at a bull elk at Evergreen Lake in Colorado.
item.dc:creator: Greg Nieto, Fox 5

item.title: Drought is causing saltwater to creep up the Delaware River. Here's what's being done about it
item.description: TRENTON, N.J. (AP) — Salty oceanwater is creeping up the Delaware River, the source for much of the drinking water for Philadelphia and millions of others, brought on by drought conditions and sea level rise, and prompting officials to tap reservoirs to push the unpotable tide back downstream.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CATALINI and BRITTANY PETERSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump-backed Florida official resigns, announces run for Gaetz seat
item.description: Florida’s Chief Financial Officer Jimmy Patronis resigned from his position and announced his candidacy for former Rep. Matt Gaetz's (R-Fla.) seat in the 1st Congressional District on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, Fox 5

item.title: Biden proposes Medicare, Medicaid cover costly weight-loss drugs like like Wegovy or Ozempic
item.description: A bipartisan coalition of congressional members have lobbied for the drugs to be covered by Medicare, saying it could save the government from spending billions of dollars on treating chronic ailments that stem from obesity.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Walmart becomes largest company to roll back diversity, equity and inclusion policies
item.description: Walmart, the world’s largest retailer, is rolling back its diversity, equity and inclusion policies, joining a growing list of major corporations that have done the same after coming under attack by conservative activists.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bird flu detected in raw milk from California, state officials warn
item.description: The avian influenza virus has been detected in a retail sample of raw milk from a California-based raw dairy farm, California health officials confirmed Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Isaiah Varela, ABC 4
